tests.name: Test 1: HTML includes all required element IDs (20 points)
tests.run: npx jest -t '1. HTML includes all required element IDs'

tests.name: Test 2: CSS stylesheet is correctly linked in head (20 points)
tests.run: npx jest -t '2. CSS stylesheet is correctly linked in head'

tests.name: Test 4: Adding a valid skill appends a <li> element and clears input (20 points)
tests.run: npx jest -t '4. Adding a valid skill appends a <li> element and clears input'

tests.name: Test 5: Prevents adding empty or whitespace-only skills (20 points)
tests.run: npx jest -t '5. Prevents adding empty or whitespace-only skills'
